name: 3-Day Desert Tour: Marrakech → Merzouga (Erg Chebbi dunes)

seo.title: 3-Day Marrakech to Merzouga Desert Tour — Erg Chebbi, camel ride, camp | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 3-day desert tour from Marrakech to Merzouga: Ait Ben Haddou (UNESCO), Todra Gorges, camel ride at sunset and a night in a desert camp under the stars. Free quote.

hero.tagline: The classic Sahara experience — Erg Chebbi dunes and a night under the stars

intro: This 3-day private tour is the most popular route to the Moroccan Sahara. From Marrakech, you cross the High Atlas via the Tizi n'Tichka pass, visit the UNESCO-listed ksar of Ait Ben Haddou, drive through the Dades Valley and the Todra Gorges, then ride a camel into the golden dunes of Erg Chebbi for a night in a desert camp — dinner, Berber music and a sky full of stars included. Return to Marrakech on day three through the Draa Valley landscapes.
